title: ZENO Glass Food Storage with Lids 4 Pack | 1000ml Airtight Food Containers | BPA Free Food Storage Containers with Plastic Locking Lids | Glass Meal Prep Lunch Box Takeaway Containers
features: SET OF 4 LARGE GLASS FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS - Includes four 1000ml durable glass containers with locking lids, ideal for meal prepping, storing leftovers, or organising food in your kitchen.

AIRTIGHT AND LEAKPROOF LOCKING LIDS - Equipped with BPA-free plastic lids featuring secure locking clips and silicone seals to create an airtight, leakproof seal, keeping food fresh for longer and preventing spills.

MULTI PURPOSE AND VERSATILE USE - Perfect for meal prep, storing snacks, or packing lunches for work or school. These containers are suitable for use in the fridge, freezer, or for taking meals on the go.

OVEN, MICROWAVE, AND DISHWASHER SAFE GLASS - Made from high-quality, heat-resistant glass, these containers can safely be used in the oven, microwave (without lids), dishwasher, or freezer, ensuring maximum convenience.
STACKABLE AND SPACE SAVING DESIGN - Designed to stack neatly in your fridge, freezer, or pantry, these containers help optimise storage space while keeping your kitchen tidy and well-organised.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Are these ZENO containers microwave safe? Yes, the glass bases are microwave safe (without the lids). Perfect for reheating meals at home or on the go. Can I use these containers in the freezer? Absolutely. The airtight lids make them ideal for storing leftovers or prepping meals in advance without freezer burn. Are the lids truly leakproof? Yes. The snap-lock plastic lids feature a silicone seal that keeps liquids secure - no spills, no mess. Can I stack these containers? They’re designed for space-saving stacking—great for keeping your fridge, freezer, or cupboard tidy and organised. Are they dishwasher safe? Yes, the glass containers are dishwasher safe. Lids can also be washed on the top rack for easy cleaning.
